name: Trophies Necklace
description: Both the soldiers of the Northern Borderlands and the dwarves they are getting in constant skirmishes with have a morbid penchant for collecting fingers of slain foes and wearing them as necklaces.
descriptionZh: 北疆的士兵以及他们经常面对的矮人都有一个病态的喜好——杀了敌人之后，剁下对方的手指，穿成项链戴在胸前。
